title: Habitifyy
content: Habit tracker SPA with Firestore real-time sync, Firebase Auth, and Redux Toolkit. Reached 274 unique visitors and 1.2K pageviews in week one with zero paid promotion. Features calendar heat maps, streak aggregation, and customizable stats with efficient Firestore queries and user-scoped security rules.

title: Coursify
content: Complete e-learning platform built solo — React + Material UI frontend, Node.js + Express REST API, MongoDB persistence, JWT auth with role-based access for student and instructor roles. Built from DB schema to UI.

title: KnowYourPlace
content: Responsive weather and news app — integrates OpenWeather API for real-time forecasts, Geolocation API for automatic location detection, and NewsCatcher API to surface country-relevant news articles.
